title: Resource Pack Tweaks
body:
![Resource Pack Tweaks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DrTheodor/rptweaks/none/logo.png)

> If you're using a beta version, PLEASE report problems you find, especially if it's a compatibility issue

### This mod improves resource pack behavior!
- Stop server pack de-load when logging off the server (useful when you have bad internet connection and you get kicked a lot).
- Load the latest used server pack before the game loads to save time (optional, can be configured using the `preload` option in the config)
- Allows to change server pack position/priority.
- Allows you to change the maximum amount of packs saved, before getting purged (`max-packs` in the config, available since version 1.1.0).
-  ...post an issue on [the GitHub repo](https://github.com/DrTheodor/rptweaks/issues) if you have suggestions (or found a bug)!
